text:
IMPARTIAL NEWS + INTELLIGENT DEBATE

Account

From Laura Woods to Chris Hoy, there is a host of incredible broadcasting talent on show in Paris this summer

TheParis Olympic Gamesare one of the biggest sporting spectacles of 2024, withTeam GBset to continue their extraordinary run of success.

As in Tokyo three years ago, UK broadcasting rights are split betweenDiscovery+and theBBC, with Discovery+ and Eurosport having access to all the action across a range of channels.

The BBC will show just one network TV channel and a second broadcast stream throughout theOlympics, but have named an all-star punditry and presenting lineup for their 250 hours of live coverage.

Meanwhile, the Discovery+ broadcasts, aired on the app, website and Eurosport, will include a team with 19 Olympic and Paralympic medals between them.

The Eurosport coverage will be fronted by three experienced presenters: Orla Chennaoui, Craig Doyle and Laura Woods.

Chennaoui will hostBonjour Parisevery morning, while Woods will presentBonsoir Parisevery evening. Woods and Doyle are covering theopening ceremony.

Among the pundits, recently unsuccessful Conservative parliamentary candidateJames Cracknelllends his rowing experience, while Team GB’s most decorated climber Shauna Coxsey is also involved.

Tom Daleywill join once he finishes competing, while Ugo Monye, Ellie Simmonds andCarl Framptonwill all grace the coverage.

Presenters

Reporters

Pundits

The BBC have an extensive panel of experienced presenters, includingClare Balding, Gabby Logan, Mark Chapman and Isa Guha.

Chapman and Logan were both involved with the Beeb’sEuro 2024 coverage, while Balding fronted theWimbledonoutput.

Among the pundits,First Dates‘Fred Sirieixwas a surprise addition as he travels to Paris to watch his daughter, diverAndrea Spendolini-Sirieix.

A host of former Team GB and international gold medallists will join him, includingNicola Adams, Rebecca Adlington, Beth Tweddle,Chris Hoy, Jessica Ennis-Hill andLaura Kenny.

title: The full list of BBC and Discovery+ Paris Olympics presenters and pundits
author: George Simms
description: From Laura Woods to Chris Hoy, there is a host of incredible broadcasting talent on show in Paris this summer
